content.raw:
All Home Services

HomesKitsPro is your one-stop shop for household appliances, electronics, water & plumbing solutions, and home improvement products. Based in Nairobi CBD, we serve customers across Kenya with fast, reliable nationwide shipping.

From water pumps and plumbing fittings to smart TVs, security cameras, and power tools — we stock everything you need to outfit, repair, and upgrade your home.

500+ Brands

Shop top-quality brands across appliances, electronics and hardware

Fast Shipping

Nationwide delivery across Kenya — fast and reliable

Your Home, Fully Equippedr

We supply quality home solutions — from water pumps and plumbing to appliances and electronics. Get expert advice and the right products for every job.

Call Now

Our Services

Water Pumps

Water Filters & Purifiers

Plumbing & Fittings

Tools & Hardware

Home Appliances

TVs & Home Entertainment

InstallinSecurity & CCTV

Irrigation Systems

Nationwide Shipping
